Compilation details
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Compiler version: 1.1.3-262
Compiler arguments:  -i /home/levi/Repositories/siana.n6cam.fw/Firmware/Model/st_ai_output/yolov8n_192_quant_pc_uf_od_coco-person-st_OE_3_3_1.onnx --json-quant-file /home/levi/Repositories/siana.n6cam.fw/Firmware/Model/st_ai_output/yolov8n_192_quant_pc_uf_od_coco-person-st_OE_3_3_1_Q.json -g network.c --load-mdesc /opt/ST/STEdgeAI/4.0/Utilities/configs/stm32n6.mdesc --load-mpool /home/levi/Repositories/siana.n6cam.fw/Firmware/Model/my_mpools/stm32n6-app.mpool --load-cdesc /opt/ST/STEdgeAI/4.0/Utilities/configs/cortex-m55.cdesc --save-mpool-file /home/levi/Repositories/siana.n6cam.fw/Firmware/Model/st_ai_ws/neural_art__network/stm32n6-app.mpool --out-dir-prefix /home/levi/Repositories/siana.n6cam.fw/Firmware/Model/st_ai_ws/neural_art__network/ --network-name network -O3 --all-buffers-info --cache-maintenance --Oauto-sched --native-float --enable-virtual-mem-pools --Omax-ca-pipe 4 --Ocache-opt --Os --enable-epoch-controller --output-info-file c_info.json --generate-stai

| epoch_117            | Hybrid |      Slice       |
| epoch_118            | Hybrid |      Slice       |
| epochs  119 -> 119   |   EC   |                  |

| epochs  121 -> 121   |   EC   |                  |

| epochs  123 -> 126   |   EC   |                  |

| epochs  135 -> 135   |   EC   |                  |
